title: Debbie Brackett
compiled_truth: Debbie Brackett is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-11-24 to 2001-06-21), Debbie Brackett sent 22 and received 1057 emails, totalling 1079 interactions. Top correspondents: [William Bradford](people/william-bradford) (12), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (9), [David Hardy](people/david-hardy) (4), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (4), [David Forster](people/david-forster) (4).
